citation.description: Ticket 02a3 body (Reproduction Steps + Actual sections) documents the exact scenario. Session log 25f1 PROBLEM RECORD comment (timestamp 1783829057) and epic bf50 comments confirm: all 19 stories landed on main (Gerrit 537-555+559), 18/19 closed SIGNED, child 5f39 and epic bf50 both force-closed UNSIGNED due to unattested [operator-attested] AC3.

criteria.criterion: The problem is reproducible and characterized: an agent-executed epic with all engineering ACs complete + landed, plus one child bearing an out-of-band [operator-attested] criterion the agent cannot attest, results in unsigned closure of both the child and the epic.

citation.description: Session log 25f1 PROBLEM RECORD comment (timestamp 1783829057) explicitly names the out-of-band items: GitHub repo VARIABLES (JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_PROJECT, ACLI_VERSION/ACLI_SHA256), SECRET (JIRA_API_TOKEN), dedicated Jira test project, and a green workflow_dispatch canary-run URL — and explains why the agent could not produce them. Ticket 02a3 body also fully enumerates these in Reproduction Steps and Actual sections. The concrete instance (epic bf50, child 5f39) is named throughout.

criteria.criterion: The gap is documented with the concrete instance (epic bf50, child 5f39) and its evidence (the specific out-of-band items required, and why the agent could not produce them).

citation.description: Ticket 02a3 deps include 'relates_to->25f1-5000-760d-4c2b' (the session log plump-kitschy-meadowlark). Session log 25f1 deps reciprocally include 'relates_to->02a3-9004-ed30-4395'. Session log 25f1 contains a dedicated PROBLEM RECORD comment (timestamp 1783829057) documenting the full trail: per-story claims, RED/teeth evidence, landing, and the force-close reasoning.

criteria.criterion: This bug links to the full session log capturing the run and the problem record.
